name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat together butter, brown sugar and granulated sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs; mix well.
4. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, cinnamon, baking soda and salt. Add to sugar mixture; mix well.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto prepared cookie sheet.
6. Sprinkle remaining sugar and cinnamon evenly over each cookie.
7. Bake 8-10 minutes. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the sheet before transferring to a wire cooling rack.
